class Me:def __init__(self):self.name = "Hawoo"self.english_name = "Elbert"self.born_year = 2002self.MBTI = "INTP"self.location = "Nanjing, Jiangsu, CN"self.undergrad_school = "Nanjing University of Post and Technology" Hi! Welcome to my Blog.
My name is Hawoo~ 我叫哈沃，英文名叫Elbert，今年22岁，就读于南京邮电大学光电信息科学与工程专业。
